# Italian Builders

Italian Builders is a community platform for founders, makers, developers,
designers, operators, investors, and supporters building from Italy or with
Italian roots.

## Primary URLs

- https://italianbuilders.co/
- https://italianbuilders.co/builders
- https://italianbuilders.co/projects
- https://italianbuilders.co/community-projects
- https://italianbuilders.co/os-projects
- https://italianbuilders.co/mission
- https://italianbuilders.co/join

## Public Content

- Builder directory: public profiles from invited members.
- Project showcase: public products, experiments, and open-source work.
- Community projects: shared workstreams maintained through the platform.
- Mission: the community purpose and positioning.

## Private Or Non-Canonical Areas

- /dashboard is member-only.
- /admin is admin-only.
- /invite and /reset-password are transactional flows.

Use https://italianbuilders.co/ as the canonical site origin.
